wave_1_critical_path.scope: Top-3 operator-visible reds in data_validation today
concrete_deliverables: Ship _stage_fundamentals_quarterly_historical(pool, cfg) in scripts/ops.py; migrate scripts/backfill_fundamentals.py into stage contract; wire into _VALIDATION_CASCADE_MAP
Fix initial_claims Thursday-anchor defect in tpcore/quality/validation/checks/macro_indicators_completeness.py; add _stage_historical_macro_indicators(pool, cfg, indicator, since)
Add corporate_actions_completeness → corporate_actions entry to _VALIDATION_CASCADE_MAP; add _stage_rebuild_corporate_actions_from_archive(pool, cfg)

wave_2_sentinel_coverage.scope: Parametrised live-DB value-pin tests for all RED-on-sentinel feeds
concrete_deliverables: tests/test_sentinel_corporate_actions.py — 10 known stock splits + 10 known cash dividends
tests/test_sentinel_iborrowdesk.py — ≥1 row per active tier-2 demand ticker in last 5d
